title: Návrhy nápadů do todo
goal: In the 'leave it to me' path of the mini next prompt, Claude sketches 2-3 candidate ideas, proposes one as the phase and offers to stash the rest into the todo archive via 'mini todo add'; and the /mini:todo slash command gains a 'suggest' (alias 'ideas') action where Claude reviews the project (graph + history) and writes a few concrete ideas straight into .mini/todo.md — so the user can fill the backlog without starting a phase or hunting for ideas outside mini.

steps.title: next prompt offers to stash ideas into todo
steps.detail: In buildNextSessionPrompt (the 'leave it to me'/no-hint path), instruct Claude to sketch 2-3 candidate ideas, propose one as the phase and offer to save the rest into the archive via 'mini todo add "<text>"'. Prompt unit tests assert the instruction appears without a userHint and not with one.

steps.title: /mini:todo suggest action
steps.detail: Extend the /mini:todo slash command body in install/commands.ts with a 'suggest' (alias 'ideas') action: Claude reviews the project (project.md + graph + recent phases) and appends a few concrete ideas straight into .mini/todo.md via 'mini todo add', without starting a phase. Update the argument-hint; update the install-commands test.

steps.title: README and CHANGELOG
steps.detail: Document the next->todo stashing and the /mini:todo suggest action in README (commands/slash list) and add an English CHANGELOG entry.
